calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To File Documents Under Seal
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JAMES ANDREWS' Motion To File Documents Under Seal.

The parties' unopposed "motion to file documents under seal" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. The proposed order is to recite the findings of CRC 2.550(d).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Cal. R. Ct. 3.770
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JAMES ANDREWS' Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Cal. R. Ct. 3.770.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss pursuant to Cal. R. Ct. 3770" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
